scenario_label: Clean pass - no parent rules breached

parent_results.reasoning: Jun 2026 maturity aggregates to 20M (98M + (-78M)), Dec 2026 to 49M. Both within bounds. OR parent not breached.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. No rule breaches detected.

scenario_label: OR parent breached - one child triggers limit

parent_results.reasoning: Jun 2026 maturity: 101M + 61M = 162M, exceeds 150M cap. Child 1 breached. OR logic: parent breached if ANY child breaches.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. OR parent rule breached - Jun 2026 concentration exceeds 150M limit.

scenario_label: AND parent breached - all children trigger

parent_results.reasoning: Barclays: 151M + 61M = 212M (exceeds 200M). JPM: 152M + 61M = 213M (exceeds 200M). Both children breached. AND logic: parent breached only if ALL children breached. Parent breached.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. AND parent rule breached - both Barclays and JPM exceed 200M market value limits.

scenario_label: AND parent NOT breached - partial child breach (critical edge case)

parent_results.reasoning: Barclays: 151M + 16M = 167M (exceeds 160M limit, child 1 breached). JPM: 152M + 31M = 183M (within 200M limit, child 2 not breached). AND logic requires ALL children breached for parent breach. Only 1 of 2 children breached, so parent NOT breached.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. AND parent rule not breached - not all children triggered their limits.

scenario_label: Multiple parent rules breached simultaneously

parent_results.reasoning: Jun 2026 maturity: 81M + 51M = 132M, exceeds 120M cap. Child breached, OR parent breached.
Barclays market value: 81M + 51M = 132M, exceeds 100M cap. Child breached, OR parent breached.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. Multiple parent rules breached - Jun 2026 maturity and Barclays counterparty both exceed limits.

scenario_label: Net calculation reduces exposure - proposed trade offsets existing position

parent_results.reasoning: Goldman Sachs market value: 121M + (-49M) = 72M, within 100M limit. Trade offsets existing position, bringing net within bounds.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. Proposed offsetting trade reduces Goldman Sachs exposure below limits.

scenario_label: Net calculation increases exposure beyond limit

parent_results.reasoning: Jul 2026 maturity: 202M + 99M = 301M, exceeds 250M cap. Trade with different counterparty in same month increases total exposure beyond limit.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. Jul 2026 maturity concentration would increase to 301M, exceeding 250M limit.

scenario_label: Edge case - net value exactly at threshold (upper bound)

parent_results.reasoning: HSBC market value: 101M + 79M = 180M, exactly equals upper bound of 180M. Breach only occurs when net_value is OUTSIDE the bounds. At boundary is acceptable.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. HSBC exposure at exactly 180M, within bounds (threshold inclusive).

scenario_label: PV01 counterparty breach where integer floor binds (floor > pct*benchmark)

children.description: BNP Paribas PV01 with formula bound (floor binds)

parent_results.reasoning: BNP Paribas pv01: |60000 + 50000| = 110000. Formula resolves as max(100000, 0.05 * 500000) = max(100000, 25000) = 100000. Floor binds. net_value 110000 exceeds resolved bound 100000. Child breached.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. BNP Paribas PV01 exposure (110000) exceeds formula-derived limit (100000, floor binds).

scenario_label: PV01 counterparty breach where percentage binds (pct*benchmark > floor)

children.description: Deutsche Bank PV01 with formula bound (pct binds)

parent_results.reasoning: Deutsche Bank pv01: |95000 + 65000| = 160000. Formula resolves as max(50000, 0.20 * 800000) = max(50000, 160000) = 160000. Percentage binds. net_value exactly equals resolved bound 160000. At boundary, not a breach.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. Deutsche Bank PV01 exposure at exactly the formula-derived limit (160000).

scenario_label: IE01 breach where PV01 rule passes (different risk dimensions)

parent_results.reasoning: Citi PV01: |50000 + 35000| = 85000, within 100000 limit (not breached). Citi IE01: |45000 + 22000| = 67000, exceeds 60000 limit (breached). AND logic: parent breached because ALL children must be within bounds. IE01 breach causes AND parent breach.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. AND parent rule breached - Citi IE01 exposure exceeds 60000 limit, despite PV01 remaining acceptable.

scenario_label: Bilateral-only rule excludes cleared positions

children.description: Morgan Stanley bilateral PV01 only, limit 80000

parent_results.reasoning: Morgan Stanley bilateral_only PV01: |70000 + 30000| = 100000. Cleared position (100000 pv01) is excluded. Aggregation includes only bilateral positions: 70000 + 30000 = 100000. Wait - recalculation: only bilateral bilateral position pv01 are 70000 (existing) + 30000 (proposed) = 100000. This exceeds 80000 limit. Child should be breached.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. Morgan Stanley bilateral-only PV01 (100000) exceeds limit (80000). Cleared positions correctly excluded.

scenario_label: AND parent with PV01+IE01 children, only PV01 breaches

parent_results.reasoning: JPM PV01: |75000 + 25000| = 100000, exceeds 90000 limit (breached). JPM IE01: |50000 + 15000| = 65000, within 70000 limit (not breached). AND logic: parent breached only if ALL children breached. 1 of 2 breached, so parent NOT breached.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. AND parent rule not breached - only PV01 child breached, IE01 within limits.

scenario_label: IE01 exactly at cap (boundary condition)

parent_results.reasoning: Barclays IE01: |45000 + 30000| = 75000, exactly equals upper bound of 75000. No breach occurs at exact boundary.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. Barclays IE01 at exactly the limit boundary (75000).

scenario_label: Maturity percentage concentration rule

children.description: Jun 2026 as percentage of 500M total limit

parent_results.reasoning: Jun 2026 market value: 101M + 119M = 220M. Total maturity book: 101M + 152M + 119M = 372M. Percentage: (220M / 500M) * 100 = 44%. Actually, re-reading: 220/500 = 0.44 = 44%, exceeds 40% cap. Net_value 44% > 40% cap, child breached.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. Jun 2026 would represent 44% of 500M total limit, exceeding 40% cap.

scenario_label: Counterparty MTM dimension aggregation

parent_results.reasoning: Goldman Sachs MTM: 2M + (-1.5M) + 1.5M = 2M total P&L, within ±50M limit.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. Goldman Sachs MTM exposure within ±50M limit.

scenario_label: Counterparty percentage concentration rule

children.description: Citi market value as percentage, 35% of 800M limit

parent_results.reasoning: Citi market value: 151M + 119M = 270M. Percentage: (270M / 800M) * 100 = 33.75%, within 35% limit.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. Citi represents 33.75% of 800M limit, within 35% cap.

scenario_label: Complex multi-parent AND/OR with mixed breach scenarios

parent_results.reasoning: Jun 2026: 121M (within 180M). Jul 2026: 102M + 41M = 143M (within 180M). AND parent: both children within bounds, parent NOT breached.
Barclays market value: 121M + 41M = 162M, exceeds 150M limit. Child breached. OR parent breached.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. Barclays counterparty concentration would exceed 150M limit, though maturity limits remain within bounds.

scenario_label: Negative notionals (short repos) with offset netting

parent_results.reasoning: Jun 2026 net market value: 202M + (-148M) = 54M, within ±300M bounds. Short repo offsets long position.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. Jun 2026 net position remains within ±300M bounds after offsetting short repo.

scenario_label: PV01 negative signed sum takes absolute value, bilateral-only filter applied

parent_results.reasoning: HSBC bilateral_only PV01: |(-70000) + 25000| = |-45000| = 45000. Wait, only bilateral counted: existing bilateral -70000, proposed bilateral +25000. |-70000 + 25000| = |-45000| = 45000, within 60000. Actually need recompute: bilateral positions have pv01 of -70000 (existing bilateral) + 25000 (proposed bilateral) = -45000. Absolute value = 45000, within 60000 limit.

expected.verdict: Trade approved. HSBC bilateral-only PV01 (45000) within 60000 limit. Cleared position correctly excluded.

scenario_label: Lower bound breach - position too short

children.description: Morgan Stanley market value range -100M to +200M

parent_results.reasoning: Morgan Stanley market value: (-79M) + (-39M) = -118M, exceeds lower bound of -100M (too short). Breach occurs outside range.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. Morgan Stanley would become -118M, exceeding lower bound of -100M.

scenario_label: Formula bound with IE01 - percentage binds over floor

parent_results.reasoning: BNP Paribas IE01: |50000 + 30000| = 80000. Formula: max(40000, 0.25 * 300000) = max(40000, 75000) = 75000 (pct binds). net_value 80000 exceeds resolved bound 75000, child breached.

expected.verdict: Trade rejected. BNP Paribas IE01 (80000) exceeds formula-derived limit (75000, pct binds).
